name: James Burgess
subtitle: Senior Software Engineer
title: Full-Stack Engineer & Technical Leader
valueProp: I build scalable systems, lead engineering teams, and architect solutions that drive business impact. Specialized in distributed systems, data engineering, and conservation technology.
about: I'm a senior software engineer with over a decade of experience building systems at scale. From processing petabytes of data at FAANG to founding and scaling startups, I've worn every technical hat—from individual contributor to CTO.

My expertise spans full-stack development, data engineering, cloud architecture, and team leadership. I've built data lakes processing terabytes daily, architected multi-database systems, and led engineering teams through complex technical challenges.

I'm passionate about conservation technology and contribute to Wildbook, an open-source platform tracking endangered species globally. I believe technology should solve meaningful problems and create lasting impact.
Whether I'm writing code, architecting systems, or leading teams—I focus on building solutions that scale, perform, and deliver real business value.

mainCert.title: Senior Software Engineer
mainCert.experience: Full-Stack, Data Engineering, Cloud Architecture, Team Leadership

additionalCerts: AWS Certified • Scrum Master • Open Source Contributor

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.subtitle: Large-Scale Distributed Systems
points: Built and maintained services processing petabytes of data daily at global scale
Led migration of legacy systems to modern microservices architecture
Improved system performance by 300% through optimization and caching strategies
Mentored junior engineers and conducted technical design reviews
Designed and implemented real-time data pipelines with 99.9% uptime

experience.title: CTO & Co-Founder
experience.subtitle: Technical Leadership & Product Development
points: Founded and scaled data analytics startup from 0 to serving enterprise clients
Built entire technical stack from scratch—web, mobile, data pipelines, infrastructure
Led engineering team of 8 through rapid growth phase
Architected multi-database data lake warehouse processing TB+ daily
Scaled company 6000% through data-driven solutions and automation

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
experience.subtitle: Web & Mobile Development
points: Built responsive web applications with React, Vue, and Angular
Developed mobile apps for iOS and Android using React Native
Created RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints for client applications
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation
Collaborated with designers and product managers on user experience

commitment.title: Let's Build Something
commitment.subtitle: Available for full-time roles or consulting
commitment.text: I'm looking for opportunities where I can leverage my experience building large-scale systems, leading engineering teams, and solving complex technical challenges. Whether it's architecting new systems, scaling existing infrastructure, or mentoring engineers—I'm passionate about creating software that makes a real impact.
